layout.delivery: Delivery across Cyprus in under 24 hours.

about.title: Your reliable partner for travel-ready classic games
about.description: We design and curate compact versions of timeless games made for life on the move. Our collections combine portability, durability, and classic design — so you can play anywhere your journey takes you.

design.title: Travel-Ready Design
design.description: Our games are compact, Lighter than your smartphone, and easy to pack — perfect for road trips, flights, and weekend escapes.

craftsmanship.title: Timeless Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.description: We focus on durable materials and classic aesthetics that feel just as good at home as they do abroad.

connection.title: Made for Connection
connection.description: From quiet chess matches to lively domino nights, our games bring people together wherever you are.

home.title: Portable classic games for every adventure.
home.description: The best sale is a profitable sale that brings health and tranquility to the community.
home.falling: Our collection from the world of play and joy

warranty.title: Warranty
warranty.description: Each of our games includes the high-quality cotton bag with printed  playing field – a well thought-out 2-in-1 concept that cleverly combines gaming fun and storage.
warranty.duration: We stand up for the quality of our products. That’s why we grant a generous <tag>2-year</tag> warranty on each cotton bag.
warranty.note: <tag>Note:</tag> The warranty refers to the cotton bag with the playing field. The return of the original bag is required for the  use of the warranty.

free_exchange.title: Free Exchange
free_exchange.description: In the case of material or manufacturing defects, we will gladly replace your product free of charge — no discussion, no hidden fees.

fast_processing.title: Fast Processing
fast_processing.description: Our warranty process is designed to be simple and efficient — no complicated procedures and no long waiting times.

direct_exchange.title: Direct Exchange
direct_exchange.description: Simply send us the defective product and receive a replacement quickly. Service can be that straightforward.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are?
whoWeAre.description: We are passionate about reimagining timeless board game classics. Our goal is to unite the world's most beautiful board games in a modern, mobile format – without losing their original charm.

services.desc1: We are passionate players who believe classic games bring people closer together.
services.desc2: Born from a love of adventure, we create games made to move with you.
services.desc3: We focus on simplicity, elegance, and smart details in every product we create.
services.desc4: Our mission is to turn ordinary trips into unforgettable memories through play.

waysToShop.title: Ways To Shop
waysToShop.description: Pick the perfect travel game for yourself or your business, with easy ordering and great deals.

for_individuals.title: For Individuals
for_individuals.description: Compact travel games for your next adventure.
for_individuals.feature3: Perfect for solo or group play

for_businesses.title: For Businesses
for_businesses.description: Bulk orders for hotels, airlines, events, and retailers.

inAction.title: In Action
inAction.description: Pick the perfect travel game for yourself or your business, with easy ordering and great deals.
